// Source: https://github.com/FrankKerschbaumer3/proffie_configs/blob/master/fallen_config.h
// Cal Kestis Survivor — Stripes base + EFFECT_FORCE 30s color shift
// Stripes<16000,-1000,Blue,Pulsing<DarkBlue,Blue,800>,Blue> — pulsing-stripe blue blade
// Force gesture triggers 30s RandomFlicker<Blue,RoyalBlue> takeover, then fades back.
StylePtr<Layers<Stripes<16000,-1000,RotateColorsX<Variation,Blue>,Pulsing<RotateColorsX<Variation,Rgb<0,0,90>>,RotateColorsX<Variation,Blue>,800>,RotateColorsX<Variation,Blue>>,TransitionEffectL<TrConcat<TrFade<600>,RandomFlicker<RotateColorsX<Variation,Blue>,RotateColorsX<Variation,Rgb<0,0,160>>>,TrDelay<30000>,RotateColorsX<Variation,Blue>,TrFade<800>>,EFFECT_FORCE>,InOutTrL<TrWipe<300>,TrWipeIn<500>,Black>>>()
